name: Fried Rice #4
recipeIngredient: 1/2 cup Cooked chicken (or ham, pork, turkey, seafood, wieners, rattlesnake)
1/2 cup Fresh/cooked peas or leftover vegetables (optional)
recipeInstructions:
1. Cut meat into very small pieces.
2. Melt butter in a frying pan or wok.
3. Add beaten eggs and stir to keep egg pieces small.
4. Stir in rice and meat, mixing thoroughly.
5. Add soy sauce and stir until the color of the rice is fairly uniform.
6. Add vegetables and continue to cook until heated through.
7. Meat and vegetables are optional. You may add several kinds or leave them out altogether.
